basic_details.job_title: IIMC Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government rules: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC - 3 years, PwBD - 10/15/13 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Library & Information Science or any discipline.
qualification.details: Graduate Graduate Apprentice (Library): Bachelor's degree in Library & Information Science or equivalent from a recognized University. Knowledge of Computer Applications. Desirable: Typing speed of 30 words per minute in English / Hindi. Graduate Graduate Apprentice (Office Assistant): Bachelor's degree in any discipline or equivalent from a recognized University. Knowledge of Computer Applications. Desirable: Typing speed of 30 words per minute in English / Hindi.

salary_details.details: Graduate Graduate Apprentice (Library): Rs. 12,300/- per month Graduate Graduate Apprentice (Office Assistant): Rs. 12,300/- per month

selection_process: Short listing on the merit basis (percentage/marks of essential qualification). Written test / personal interview / skill test. Mode of selection may change as per the requirement of the Institute.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iimc.gov.in.
Applications will be considered who opted Delhi preference for written test / personal interview / skill test.
Candidates claiming reservation must submit certificate as per Central Government format.
Mandatory to enroll on National Graduate Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) before applying.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIMC Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IIMC Apprentice posts is 22 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Graduate Apprentice (Library) post?
faq.answer: For the Graduate Apprentice (Library) post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Library & Information Science or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university. Knowledge of computer applications is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the IIMC Graduate Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the IIMC Apprentice positions is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Graduate Apprentice posts at IIMC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Apprentice posts at IIMC. These are distributed between the Graduate Apprentice (Library) and Graduate Apprentice (Office Assistant) roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Graduate Apprentice (Library) and Graduate Apprentice (Office Assistant) posts will receive a stipend of Rs. 12,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIMC Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the IIMC Apprentice recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the IIMC Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the IIMC Apprentice posts is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the IIMC Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by a written test, personal interview, or skill test. The institute may modify the selection mode as per its requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Do candidates need to enroll on any portal before applying?
faq.answer: Yes, it is mandatory for candidates to enroll on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) before submitting their application for the IIMC Apprentice posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Indian Institute of Mass Communication (IIMC), which is www.iimc.gov.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.
